精彩留言

佢果句說話明顯地係針對香港學生，我覺得需要一個apology唔係amendment。
其實無論係老師定學生都好，做錯左唔緊要，最緊要承認同反省。特別係學生因為唔識野（可能係學業上，亦可能係處事上）更可能會犯錯。

正如有人以前疑似洩漏題目一樣，有好多野都係 solely based on "observations" and "statistical count"。

做錯事最緊要坦誠道歉。我覺得呢位講師係呢封郵件事情處理上應該要為自己的言論（一時諗錯野又好，一時用錯字）比返同學一個正式道歉，唔好再對學生串串貢。

題外話，我知你mon緊post。呢個圈子好細，但其實知情的人仕比你想象中多好多。希望大家已經長大，自己識點正確處理返件事，唔好一時行差踏錯，一個大話蓋一個大話，破壞自己前途。

人在做，天在看。

佢淨係出左封amendment
仲要連封amendment都串過馬撚

唔評論份功課，點為止plagiarism，呢到咁多數學高手同學術界人仕自有公論。

我只係想知，呢位lecturer出過post 1入面針對一班香港DSE畢業學生的公開郵件，可唔可以對班內同學出一封mass mail收回你的言論同道歉？

我覺得，一個本身冇乜honesty 的人，無乜資格話冇證據之下胡亂批評其他人的academic honesty。

人在做，天在看。

Dear ENGG 1130 students,

I understand that I have adopted poor wordings in one of my previous emails. Within that email, I have absolutely no intention to distinguish among one group of students from other groups. I hereby apologize to everyone who feels unhappy or discontent after reading that email, and I would like to restate that I treat all students in my class fairly, regardless of their background, no matter in the past, currently, or in the future.

I am new to CUHK and not familiar with the procedures for handling academic honesty cases. My apology for the miscommunication. You will hear directly from the Faculty of Engineering.

Meanwhile, please stay healthy and safe. I sincerely hope everyone will enjoy studying this course, and I will try my utmost to cater for the needs of all students throughout the rest of Term 2.

Best wishes,
Hugo Mak


Dear Students of ENGG1130,

It was brought to our attention that a lecturer of the course has recently raised the issue of plagiarism in a series of emails. We would like to clarify that the way he handles the suspected plagiarism cases is not in line with the established protocol of the Faculty and University. In particular, teachers should report suspected plagiarism cases to the Faculty Disciplinary Committee (FDC), which will then invite the students involved to a panel and ensure that they have a fair chance to be heard. Only the FDC has the authority to decide whether a case is established, and if so, to impose penalties in accordance with University guidelines at:

https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/policy/academichonesty/Eng_htm_files_(2013-14)/p06.htm
CUHK disciplinary guidelines and procedures
Section 6 CUHK disciplinary guidelines and procedures . Procedures for Handling Cases of Academic Dishonesty. As approved by the Senate Committee on Student Discipline, the following procedures for handling student discipline cases are adopted:
www.cuhk.edu.hk


Before the FDC decision, students suspected in plagiarism are assumed to be innocent and should never be unfairly treated.

In addition, we have also heard students’ feedback on homework assignments and assessment policies. To ensure the teaching and learning quality, the Faculty has assigned a representative to monitor the teaching of the course, including the lectures, homework assignments, and assessment schemes and policies. We will review the situation continuously as the term progresses and take actions if necessary.

We deeply regret this incident and hope this clarifies the issues. May we wish you all a fruitful term ahead.

Best wishes,
Martin Wong
Dean of Engineering
